LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Horde_Desc: Consumes one horde gate sigil, routes a colonist to the circle, and tears open several perimeter breach fronts that pulse ordinary abyssal warforms into the map. It is not a boss ritual. It is the first deliberate army-scale summon after Reactor Saint.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Horde_Rewards: • Massive residue and battlefield salvage payout • First post-saint army-scale pressure check • Uses regular abyssal warforms instead of a named boss reward ladder
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRitual_Horde_SideEffects: • Opens multiple perimeter breach fronts instead of one local spawn • Pressure scales hard with colony size, wealth, and protocol difficulty • Does not grant boss or mini-boss drops even when the wave becomes enormous
LanguageData.ABY_HordeGateSummonSuccessDesc: Multiple perimeter rupture fronts are opening. Ordinary abyssal warforms are spilling onto the map in repeated portal pulses.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardGuaranteed_Horde: Guaranteed: a breach-closure cache with high residue, horde fragments, and salvage routed out of the army-scale lattice. Command node kills spill an extra bonus when present, and the fragment stream now feeds both the Litany Grinder and the Phalanx Driver forge branch.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleRewardProgression_Horde: Progression: stress-tests multi-front late defense after Reactor Saint while feeding a distinct post-saint economy layer. Horde fragments now escalate from raw salvage into a dedicated forge branch instead of boss-tier cores.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeRitualMeta: Sigils on map: {0} • Pattern: {1} • Fronts: {2} • Pulses: {3} • Command gate: {4} • Forecast: {5} • Protocol: {6}
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_HordeLocked: The horde gate remains dormant until the first Reactor Saint kill is recorded on this save.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeOperationBulletin_Unknown: Operation bulletin could not be stabilized.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeDoctrineWarning_Flood: Warning: the opening flood wants to pin defenders with speed and body count. Do not overextend on the first breach.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeDoctrineWarning_Fireline: Warning: this pattern punishes static firing lines. Snipers and priests will try to hold open lanes behind the front.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeDoctrineWarning_Grinder: Warning: the grinder host wants a dense frontal collapse. Do not let heavy bodies stack on a single doorway.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeDoctrineWarning_Siege: Warning: late heavy anchors are more likely here. Leaving open ground unchecked increases the chance of siege pressure stabilizing.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeDoctrineWarning_Unknown: Warning: the breach pattern is unstable. Expect mixed pressure with no clean specialization.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeDoctrine_Flood_Summary: Assault-heavy flood. Expects fast pressure, high body count, and relatively light precision support.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeDoctrine_Fireline_Summary: Fireline doctrine. Expect ranged suppression, sniper picks, and denser support pressure behind the front line.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeDoctrine_Grinder_Summary: Breakthrough doctrine. Predicts heavier bruisers, harvest pressure, and slower but denser frontal collapse.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeDoctrine_Siege_Summary: Siege doctrine. Expects a rarer late-pressure composition with elite anchors and possible Idol-backed support.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeDoctrine_Unknown_Summary: Forecast doctrine could not be stabilized. Expect a mixed perimeter breach with no clean specialization.
LanguageData.ABY_HordePhasesPreview_Unknown: Phase routing could not be stabilized. Expect a rough multi-front breach.
LanguageData.ABY_HordePhase_Marking_Summary: Initial probing cuts. Lighter perimeter breaches map approach lanes and expose the colony before the full offensive commits.
LanguageData.ABY_HordePhase_Lattice_Summary: Main offensive phase. Multiple fronts stay active and the doctrine profile stabilizes into the bulk of the attack.
LanguageData.ABY_HordePhase_Surge_Summary: Concentrated final drive. Fewer but denser portals accelerate elite or support pressure into a late push.
LanguageData.ABY_HordePhase_Collapse_Summary: Dissipation window. Remaining rupture fronts spit out a smaller tail while the breach starts folding shut.
LanguageData.ABY_HordePhase_Unknown_Summary: Phase routing could not be stabilized. Expect an uneven multi-front breach.
LanguageData.ABY_HordePerimeter_Summary: Perimeter intelligence is active. Fronts are assigned to approach lanes, internal colony cells are avoided, and heavy pressure is split across distinct edges when possible.
LanguageData.ABY_HordePerimeter_Unknown: Perimeter routing could not be stabilized. Expect a rough multi-front breach.
LanguageData.ABY_HordePerimeter_Line_Command: Front {0}: {1} lane on the {2} perimeter. Command-linked pressure is routed through this edge.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeCommandGate_Summary: Secondary objective expected. While intact, one perimeter command node accelerates the offensive and keeps {0} reserved reinforcement bursts routed through its front. Destroying it cancels those command-linked bursts and slows the breach cadence.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeCommandGate_AbsentSummary: No secondary command node is expected for this breach forecast.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeCommandGate_LineCadence: Intact cadence factor: {0}% of normal portal delay on the command front.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeCommandGate_LineCollapse: Destroying it immediately cancels remaining command-linked reinforcements.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeCommandGate_Spawned: A {0} command gate node stabilizes on the {1} perimeter. Destroying it cancels reserved reinforcements and slows the offensive.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeCommandGate_Destroyed: The {0} command gate collapses. Remaining command-linked reinforcements are severed and the breach loses tempo.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeCommandGate_Inspect: Command gate node. Doctrine: {0}. Remaining command bursts: {1}. While intact it accelerates portal cadence on its front and preserves reserved reinforcements.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeCommandGate_InspectReward: If destroyed it spills a command salvage bonus tied to remaining bursts.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeEconomy_Summary: Closure payout: {0}. Command node kill bonus: {1}. No boss or miniboss cores are routed through this ritual. Horde fragments can be reforged into the Litany Grinder and the Phalanx Driver once the forge reaches the proper fragment tiers.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeEconomy_Unknown: Reward routing could not be stabilized. Expect residue-heavy salvage without boss-tier drops.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeEconomy_LineCommandAbsent: No command node bonus is expected for this forecast.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeEconomy_LineNoBoss: No boss cores, saint caches, or miniboss-unique drops are routed through Horde payouts.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeEconomy_LineForge: Forge routing: horde fragments can be refined into the Litany Grinder at the horde tier and the Phalanx Driver once deeper fragment access is unlocked.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeEconomy_LineBacklash: Additional backlash: +{0}% instability heat and +{1}% contamination pressure on invocation.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeEconomy_ClosureSpawned: The {0} operation starts folding shut. Condensed horde salvage spills out near the last active front.
LanguageData.ABY_HordeEconomy_CommandSpawned: The {0} command gate ruptures into salvage. Its condensed war-lattice fragments and routed supply caches spill onto the field.
